title: goniophlebium subamoenum
intro: Goniophlebium subamoenum is a species of fern, belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Asian medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Goniophlebium subamoenum include its potential to treat various ailments such as arthritis, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a paste or poultice to alleviate skin irritations and wounds.
